violations.detail: Transient download failures are common during image builds. A wgetrc file with retry settings makes builds more robust. The fix inserts a comment, ENV WGETRC, and a COPY heredoc with retry defaults.
violations.message: stage uses wget without a retry config; consider adding wgetrc with retry settings
violations.sourceCode: RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates wget

suggestedFix.description: Add wget retry config via COPY heredoc

edits.newText:
# [tally] wget configuration for improved robustness
ENV WGETRC=/etc/wgetrc
COPY --chmod=0644 <<EOF ${WGETRC}
retry_connrefused = on
timeout = 15
tries = 5
EOF
